Level: Does not specify the expected behavior if the user tries to start an inference without selecting all required parameters
Issue: The system shall disable the 'Start the inference' button until all required parameters are selected

Level: Does not specify the expected behavior if the user tries to export results without running an inference
Issue: The system shall disable the 'Export results' button until an inference has been run

Level: Does not specify the expected behavior if the user tries to view results without running an inference
Issue: The system shall disable the 'View results' button until an inference has been run

Level: Does not specify the expected behavior if the user tries to select a hardware component that is not available
Issue: The system shall display an error message and prevent the selection of unavailable hardware components

Level: Does not specify the expected behavior if the user tries to import more than the maximum number of images
Issue: The system shall display an error message and prevent the import of more than 100 images

Level: Does not specify the expected behavior if the user tries to import a neural network topology that is not compatible with the specified hardware
Issue: The system shall display an error message and prevent the import of incompatible neural network topologies
